items.headline_en: Kimi AI Upgraded to K2.6 with Enhanced Coding and Agent Capabilities
items.summary_en: Moonshot AI's Kimi platform has been updated to K2.6, featuring improved coding performance and smarter AI agent functionalities including Kimi Code, Kimi Claw, Agent Swarm, and Deep Research tools.

items.headline_en: Codex v0.123.0: Amazon Bedrock Provider, /mcp Verbose Mode, and Plugin Loading Improvements
items.summary_en: Codex v0.123.0 adds a built-in Amazon Bedrock model provider with configurable AWS profiles, a new /mcp verbose command for full MCP diagnostics, and improved .mcp.json plugin loading for background agents.

items.headline_en: GPT Image 2 Released: Flexible Sizes, Token Pricing, and 50% Batch Discount
items.summary_en: OpenAI released GPT Image 2, a new image generation and editing model supporting flexible sizes, high-fidelity inputs, token-based pricing, and a Batch API at 50% discount. The Agents SDK also added controlled sandbox execution, customizable test harnesses, and memory control.

items.headline_en: MiniMax Launches Music 2.6 with Cover Feature and M2.7 Self-Improving Agent Model
items.summary_en: MiniMax released Music 2.6 with a new Cover feature offering deeper bass and richer instrumentation. Also introduced M2.7, enabling recursive self-improvement for models with significant practical capability gains over M2.5, along with an Agent harness for production-grade coding and office task support.

items.headline_en: Replicate Releases Agent Skills for Claude Code, Codex, and Other Coding Assistants
items.summary_en: Replicate published Agent Skills — markdown instruction files that give coding assistants expert knowledge on model discovery, comparison, API execution, and prompting techniques for image and video generation. Compatible with Claude Code, OpenCode, Codex, and other tools via the open Agent Skills spec. Also added a fallback model option for Nano Banana Pro when Google API is at capacity.
items.evidence_excerpt: Changelog RSS Atom li]:pb-8"> Agent skills for Replicate April 21, 2026 Replicate now publishes agent skills , a collection of markdown instruction files that give coding assistants expert knowledge about working with AI models on Replicate. Skills cover model discovery, comparison, and execution via the API, along with detailed prompting techniques for image generation and video generation models. They follow the open Agent Skills spec and work with Claude Code, OpenCode, OpenAI Codex, and other compatible tools. Install Copy npx skills add replicate/skills This installs all of Replicate’s skills into your project and configures them for your coding assistant automatically. Skills and MCP Skills are complementary to Replicate’s MCP server . MCP gives your coding assistant API tools. Sk...
items.target_summary: Changelog RSS Atom li]:pb-8"> Agent skills for Replicate April 21, 2026 Replicate now publishes agent skills , a collection of markdown instruction files that give coding assistants expert knowledge about working with AI models on Replicate. Skills cover mo...
items.target_excerpt: Changelog RSS Atom li]:pb-8"> Agent skills for Replicate April 21, 2026 Replicate now publishes agent skills , a collection of markdown instruction files that give coding assistants expert knowledge about working with AI models on Replicate. Skills cover model discovery, comparison, and execution via the API, along with detailed prompting techniques for image generation and video generation models. They follow the open Agent Skills spec and work with Claude Code, OpenCode, OpenAI Codex, and other compatible tools. Install Copy npx skills add replicate/skills This installs all of Replicate’s skills into your project and configures them for your coding assistant automatically. Skills and MCP Skills are complementary to Replicate’s MCP server . MCP gives your coding assistant API tools. Skills give it knowledge about how to use those tools well: which models to choose, how to write prompts, and what tradeoffs to consider. For more details, see the agent skills reference or the GitHub repository . Fallback model for Nano Banana Pro March 2, 2026 Nano Banana Pro can now fall back to a backup model (currently ByteDance Seedream 5.0 lite ) when Google’s API is at capacity, instead of f...

items.headline_en: Cohere Retires Embed v2.0 and Aya Expanse/Vision 8B Models
items.summary_en: As of April 4, 2026, Cohere retired embed-english-v2.0, embed-english-light-v2.0, embed-multilingual-v2.0, c4ai-aya-expanse-8b, and c4ai-aya-vision-8b. Recommended replacements are embed-v4.0 for embeddings and command-a-reasoning-08-2025 for chat tasks.

Retired models: embed-english-v2.0 embed-english-light-v2.0 embed-multilingual-v2.0 c4ai-aya-expanse-8b c4ai-aya-vision-8b We recommend these replacements: Embedding tasks embed-english-v3.0 embed-multilingual-v3.0 embed-v4.0 Chat tasks command-r7b-12-2024 command-a-03-2025 command-a-reasoning-08-2025 For the full announcement and lifecycle context, see the Deprecations page. For questions or assistance, contact support@cohere.com .

items.headline_en: Cohere Updates Pricing Page with North, Compass, and Model Vault Enterprise Tiers

items.headline_en: Mistral Launches Free Le Chat with Memory, Image Generation, and 40+ Enterprise Connectors
items.summary_en: Mistral's free Le Chat personal AI assistant includes access to state-of-the-art models, up to 500 saved memories, image generation, project-based chat organization, and over 40 enterprise connectors.
